languages.title: Ririmi
languages.subtitle: Hlawula ririmi leri tirhisiweke eka app hinkwayo.
languages.noResults: Ku hava tindzimi leti fambelanaka na ku lavisisa ka wena.

phone.label: Nomboro ya riqingho
phone.searchCountry: Lavisisa tiko, khodi, kumbe xirhangi xo bela riqingho
phone.noCountries: A ku na matiko lama fambelanaka na ku lavisisa ka wena.
phone.tooShort: Nomboro leyi ya riqingho yi komile ngopfu.
phone.tooLong: Nomboro leyi ya riqingho yi lehe ngopfu.
phone.invalid: Tsala nomboro ya riqingho leyi tirhaka ya tiko leri hlawuriweke.
phone.valid: Nomboro ya riqingho ya matiko ya misava leyi tirhaka

auth.onboardingTagline: Munghana wa vuhlayiseki bya munhu hi xiyexe eka minkarhi leyi nga exikarhi ka “Ndzi kahle” na “Ndzi lava mpfuno.”
auth.createSubtitle: Hlawula ndlela yo nghena ku sirhelela girafu ya wena ya vuhlayiseki.
auth.signInFailedMessage: A hi swi kotanga ku hetisa ku nghena. Languta vuhlanganisi bya wena ivi u ringeta nakambe.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Ku nghena a swi kumeki
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Ku tirhisa xiyenge xa nhluvukiso wa ndhawu. Native Google Ku nghena swi tirha eka ku aka ka nhluvukiso.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair sweswi kutani u ya emahlweni u yi engetela endzhaku.
auth.northStarBody: Xilo lexi ambariwaka xa VL01 xi nga hlohlotela ku khuluka ka vuhlayiseki hi tipompi na swikombiso swo leha swa ku tshikilela.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Munghana wa wena wa vuhlayiseki wo olova emepeni na le ka tifoyini.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear yi nga pfuna hi movha wa le kaya, movha wa murindzi, movha wa xihatla, ku bela swivangelo, na nseketelo wa rito.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Yi tirhisiwa eka mepe, tindhawu ta khombo, ku fika loku hlayisekeke, na SOS mongo.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving yi kombela ndhawu leswaku vahlayisi va ta twisisa laha mpfuneto wu nga lavekaka kona. U nga cinca leswi endzhaku eka Switirhisiwa.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Switiviso swi seketela ku nghena na swiendlakalo swa xihatla.
permissions.notificationsBody: Hi tirhisa ntsena switiviso swa switsundzuxo swa vuhlayiseki, ku pfuxetiwa ka xihatla, na switsundzuxo leswi u swi pfumelelaka.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Ndhawu yi hlayisa mongo wa vuhlayiseki wu ri lowu kongomeke
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yi tirhisa ndhawu ya wena eka mepe wa vuhlayiseki, tindhawu ta khombo, ku avelana hi ku hatlisa, na SOS mongo. U nga cinca leswi endzhaku eka Switirhisiwa.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Switsundzuxo swa vuhlayiseki swi lava switiviso
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yi rhumela switsundzuxo swo nghena, ku pfuxetiwa ka xihatla, na switsundzuxo swa vuhlayiseki leswi u swi pfumelelaka. A hi tirhisi switiviso swa swinavetiso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Microphone yi nyika matimba eka tifoyini ta vuhlayiseki
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yi tirhisa microphone ya wena ntsena loko u sungula AI munghana kumbe riqingho ra vuhlayiseki.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth yi hlanganisa wearable ya wena
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yi tirhisa Bluetooth ku hlanganisa na NorthStar vuhlalu, ku hlaya xiyimo xa vuhlanganisi, na ku hlohlotela ku khuluka ka vuhlayiseki ku suka eka leswi ambariwaka.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yi tirhisa khamera ntsena loko u hlawula ku teka xifaniso xa phurofayili kumbe ku avelana xifaniso xa vuhlayiseki.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving yi hlayisa ku khuluka loku ku kumeka ku suka eka Switirhisiwa na dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Hlawula rito ra munghana leri titwaka ri hlayisekile swinene ku ri twa.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ku vekiwa tihlo hi ku rhula eka vuhlayiseki bya siku na siku.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Avela mongo na vanhu lava tshembekaka.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tipompi ta ntlhanu ti nga tlakuka ku ya eka SOS na switsundzuxo swa murindzi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Endla xivangelo xo saseka xo siya xiyimo lexi nga nyawuriki.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Sungula riqingho ra munghana wa nkarhi wa xiviri loko u lava nseketelo.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Ringeta ku khuluka ka vuhlayiseki eka demo ya ntshikelelo wa le hansi.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Hlayisa vuhlalu ekusuhi loko u ri karhi u skena.
jewelry.noDevices: Ku hava switirhisiwa swa NorthStar swa le kusuhi leswi kumiweke ku fikela sweswi.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ku skena a ku swi kotanga ku sungula. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
jewelry.scanFailed: A hi kumanga vuhlalu bya le kusuhi. Languta Bluetooth, hlayisa NorthStar ekusuhi, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ku skena a ku swi kotanga ku sungula. Languta Bluetooth mfikelelo kutani u ringeta nakambe.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Mfikelelo wa xitirhisiwa xa le kusuhi wu timiwile. Pfumelela Bluetooth ku nghena eka Switirhisiwa, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar swi teke nkarhi wo leha swinene ku hlanganisa. Yi tshinete ekusuhi ivi u ringeta nakambe.
jewelry.connectFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku hlanganisa na NorthStar. Languta leswaku yi chajiwe naswona yi le kusuhi, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
jewelry.emptyTitle: A ku na switirhisiwa swa le kusuhi ku fikela sweswi
jewelry.emptyMessage: Hlayisa NorthStar yi chajiwile naswona yi ri ekusuhi na riqingho leri, kutani u tlhela u skena.
jewelry.searchingMessage: U lava switirhisiwa swa NorthStar ekusuhi...

home.subtitle: Dashboard ya mutirhisani wa vuhlayiseki
home.readyBody: Rito, mepe, vuhlalu, na vahlayisi swi le kule hi pompi yin’we.

map.title: Mepe wa vuhlayiseki
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go xikombiso xa le mahlweni; Mapbox yi hundzisela eka ku aka ka nhluvukiso.
map.updateFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku pfuxeta ndhawu ya wena. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
map.notRequested: Mfikelelo wa ndhawu a wu komberiwanga. U nga yi pfumelela endzhaku ku suka eka Switirhisiwa.
map.permissionOff: Ku nghena ka ndhawu ku timiwile. Yi pfumelele eka Switirhisiwa leswaku yi veka mepe wa vuhlayiseki exikarhi eka wena.
map.timeout: Ndhawu ya wena yi teka nkarhi wo leha ku tlula lowu a wu languteriwile. Suka kun’wana hi xikombiso lexi nga erivaleni ivi u ringeta nakambe.
map.savedEmptyTitle: A ku na tindhawu leti hlayisiweke ku fikela sweswi
map.savedEmptyMessage: Tindzhawu leti tshembekaka leti u ti hlayisaka ti ta humelela laha leswaku u ta kota ku ti fikelela hi ku hatlisa.

zones.crowding: Ku tala ka vanhu nivusiku swinene
zones.lowLighting: Ndhawu ya ku voninga ka le hansi

map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.offlineCompanion: Mufambisi wa le handle ka inthanete
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Ku hlanganisa hi ndlela leyi sirhelelekeke eka munghana wa wena wa rito...
safetyCall.useOffline: Tirhisa munghana wa le handle ka inthanete
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Thayipa loko ku vulavula swi tika
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Bulo ra wena ri sungula laha
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Sungula riqingho kutani u thayipa rungula loko u lunghekile.

history.clearTitle: Matimu ya mbulavurisano lama nga erivaleni?
history.clearMessage: Leswi swi susa marungula ya AI ya munghana lama hlayisiweke eka xitirhisiwa lexi.
history.cannotUndo: Leswi a swi nge tlheriseriwi endzhaku.
history.title: Matimu ya mbulavurisano
history.subtitle: AI marungula ya munghana ya hlayisiwile eka xitirhisiwa lexi.
history.empty: A ku na mabulo lama hlayisiweke ku fikela sweswi.
history.emptyTitle: A ku na mabulo ku fikela sweswi
history.emptyMessage: Mabulo ya wena ya AI ya munghana ya ta humelela laha endzhaku ka riqingho ra wena ro sungula.
history.loadFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku layicha matimu ya mbulavurisano. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
history.clearFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku basisa matimu ya mbulavurisano. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
history.deleteFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku susa mbulavurisano wolowo. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.

voices.title: Marito ya mina ya riqingho ra vuhlayiseki
voices.subtitle: Hlawula rito ra munghana leri titwaka ri ri kahle ku ri twa.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Hi kombela u ringeta ku hlawula rito nakambe.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Xikombiso lexi xa rito a xi nga tlangiwi. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.

capybara.name: Capybear
capybara.description: ku olova, ku rhula, ku va ehansi

bestie.name: Bestie wa xisati
bestie.description: ku vangama, ku tiyisisa, ku burisana

boyfriend.name: Mufana wa yena
boyfriend.description: ku tiyimisela, ku va na rirhandzu, ku va kona

muscleMan.name: Mutirhi wa misiha
muscleMan.description: ku titshemba, ku sirhelela, ku hlohlotela

settings.offlineMode: Mode ya le handle ka inthanete
settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Tirhisa tinhlamulo ta vanghana leti hlanganisiweke loko switifiketi swa netiweke kumbe Hume swi nga kumeki.
settings.privacyBody: Rhumela ehandle kumbe ku susa datha ya laha kaya leyi hlayisiweke eka xitirhisiwa lexi.
settings.preparingExport: Ku lulamisela ku rhumela ematikweni mambe...
settings.deleteAll: Susa datha hinkwayo ya laha kaya
settings.exportFailedMessage: A wu swi koti ku rhumela ehandle data ya wena sweswi.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Susa datha hinkwayo ya laha kaya?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Leswi swi susa phurofayili ya wena, swiletelo, vuhlanganisi bya xihatla, matimu ya mbulavurisano, switsundzuxo swa mpfumelelo, na nkarhi wa vuhlayiseki bya laha kaya eka xitirhisiwa lexi.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: A swi koteki ku susa datha ya laha kaya sweswi.
settings.linkFailed: A swi koteki ku pfula xihlanganisi

sections.languageSubtitle: Ririmi ra mpfumelelo wa vuhlanganisi na sisiteme
sections.companionSubtitle: Swihlawulekisi swa rito na swa le handle ka inthanete
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, vahlayisi, na vahlanganisi va xihatla
sections.privacySubtitle: Matimu, ku rhumela ematikweni mambe, ku susa, na pholisi
sections.accountSubtitle: Xiyenge xa wena xa sweswi xa VeryLoving

settings.updateFailedMessage: A hi swi kotanga ku hlayisa ku tsakela koloko. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
settings.signOutFailedTitle: A nga swi kotanga ku huma
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Xiyenge xa wena xa ha tirha. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.

contacts.title: Vuxaka bya xihatla
contacts.subtitle: Vanhu lava tshembekaka lava kumekaka hi nkarhi wa ku khuluka ka vuhlayiseki.
contacts.name: Vito
contacts.empty: A ku na vuhlanganisi bya xihatla lebyi engeteriweke ku fikela sweswi.
contacts.emptyTitle: A ku na vuhlanganisi bya xihatla ku fikela sweswi
contacts.emptyMessage: Engetela munhu loyi u n’wi tshembaka leswaku a ta va a lunghekile loko ku khuluka ka vuhlayiseki ku n’wi lava.
contacts.removeMessage: Munhu loyi a nge he humeleli eka ku khuluka ka wena ka xihatla.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: A hi swi kotanga ku hlayisa vuhlanganisi lebyi. Languta vuxokoxoko ivi u ringeta nakambe.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: A hi swi kotanga ku susa ku hlangana loku. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.

device.title: Vulawuri bya switirhisiwa
device.subtitle: Lawula xitirhisiwa xa wena xa NorthStar.

friends.title: Vanghana
friends.subtitle: Vahlayisi, swikombelo, na girafu ya xihatla.
friends.emptyTitle: Xirhendzevutani xa wena xa vuhlayiseki a xi na nchumu
friends.emptyMessage: Vanghana na vahlayisi lava tshembekaka va ta humelela laha loko va engeteriwile.

emergency.title: Xiyimo xa xihatla SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate ntsena loko u lava nseketelo wa xihatla.
emergency.body: Leswi swi ta tivisa ku khuluka ka vuhlayiseki bya wena na ku lulamisela vuhlanganisi bya xihatla.
emergency.notificationBody: Ku khuluka ka wena ka xihatla ku lunghekile.
emergency.addContact: Engetela xihlanganisi xa xihatla eka Switirhisiwa.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Stub yo avelana ndhawu yi lunghekile. Hlanganisa ndhawu yo hetelela ya ku avelana ka le ndzhaku ku rhumela swihlanganisi leswi hanyaka.

quickShare.title: Ku avelana hi ku hatlisa
quickShare.subtitle: Ku khuluka ka ku avelana ka ndhawu ku lunghekile.

capybearTap.title: Capybear khoma
capybearTap.subtitle: Tikhoma kambirhi NorthStar ya wena ku hoxa orenji ya vuhlayiseki.
capybearTap.body: Ndlela ya swikombiso yi lulamerile ku endla tiwayiri ta xiendlakalo xa BLE.

debug.title: VeryLoving tluka ra ku lulamisa swihoxo
debug.subtitle: Ndlela ya nhluvukiso ntsena.

errors.voiceOffline: U vonaka u nga ri eka inthanete. Rungula ra wena ri ta rhumeriwa loko u tlhela u hlanganisa.
errors.voiceQueued: Rihungu ri hlayisiwile. Yi ta rhumeriwa loko munghana wa rito a tlhela a hlanganisa.
errors.voiceRetrying: Ku ringeta ku rhumela rungula ra wena nakambe...
errors.voiceConnecting: Ku hlanganisa hi ndlela leyi sirhelelekeke eka munghana wa wena wa rito...
errors.microphone: Mfikelelo wa microphone wa laveka eka ku bela riqingho hi rito. U nga yi pfumelela eka Switirhisiwa, kutani u thayipa rungula ematshan’weni ya sweswo.
errors.billing: Mufambisi wa rito wa inthanete a nga kumeki swa xinkarhana. U nga ya emahlweni na munghana wa le handle ka inthanete.
errors.authentication: Mufambisi wa rito a nga swi kotanga ku tiyisisa xiyenge lexi. Nghena nakambe kutani u tirhisa munghana wa le handle ka inthanete sweswi.
errors.timeout: Munghana wa rito u teke nkarhi wo leha swinene ku hlamula. Languta vuhlanganisi bya wena ivi u ringeta nakambe.
errors.network: A hi swi kotanga ku fikelela munghana wa rito. Languta vuhlanganisi bya wena, kutani u ringeta nakambe kutani u ya emahlweni u nga ri eka inthanete.
errors.genericVoice: Xin’wana xi kavanyete riqingho ra rito. Ringeta nakambe, kutani u ya emahlweni na munghana loyi a nga riki eka inthanete.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving yi lava mfikelelo wa microphone ku hlayiseka na AI ku bela riqingho ra munghana.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving yi tirhisa ndhawu ya wena eka mepe wa vuhlayiseki na switirhisiwa swa vuhlayiseki swa le kusuhi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving yi tirhisa Bluetooth ku hlanganisa na vuhlalu bya wena bya vuhlayiseki bya NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Ndlela leyi yo nghena a yi kumeki eka vuhundzuluxeri bya app leyi.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Yana emhlweni hi nkombiso (ku hluvukisa ntsena)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mokgwa wa nkombiso wu tirhisa ntsena data ya vuxisi leyi nga eka xitirhisiwa. Vukorhokeri leswi hlanganisiweke a byi tiyisisiwanga, naswona sexini leyi yi sungula nakambe loko app yi layichiwa nakambe.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Khodi yo tiyisisa a yi tirhi kumbe yi hundzeriwile hi nkarhi. Kombela khodi leyintshwa kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ku ringetiwe ku nghena ko tala ngopfu. Yimanyana, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ku tiyisisa ku nghena swi teke nkarhi wo leha ngopfu. Kambela vuhlanganisi bya wena kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: A hi swi kotanga ku fikelela vukorhokeri byo nghena. Kambela vuhlanganisi bya wena kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Sexini ya wena yi hundzeriwile hi nkarhi. Nghena nakambe.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Mepe wa vuhlayiseki a wu layichiwanga. Kambela vuhlanganisi bya wena kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Ndhawu ya nkarhi wa sweswi a yi kumeki. Ku kombisiwa ndhawu ya wena yo hetelela leyi hlayisiweke ku suka eka %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku avelana ndhawu ya wena. Kambela mpfumelelo wa ndhawu kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Hi leyi ndhawu ya mina leyi rhekhodiweke hi %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Hi leyi ndhawu ya mina yo hetelela leyi hlayisiweke, leyi rhekhodiweke hi %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Mpfumelelo wa Bluetooth wu timiwile. Wu pfule eka Switirhisiwa, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth yi timiwile. Yi pfule, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Ku hlanganisa hi Bluetooth a ku kumeki eka xitirhisiwa kumbe vuhundzuluxeri bya app leyi.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku kuma NorthStar. Yi hlayise yi ri ekusuhi, kambela Bluetooth, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: A ku kumekanga switirhisiwa swa NorthStar ekusuhi. Yi hlayise yi ri ekusuhi kutani u skena nakambe.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku hlanganisa na NorthStar. Tiyisisa leswaku yi chajiwile naswona yi le kusuhi, kutani u ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: A hi swi kotanga ku hlayisa ndhawu leyi. Ringeta nakambe.
releaseCritical.lastSOSAttempt: Ku ringeta ka SOS ko hetelela
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Xichayachaya xa riqingho xi pfulekile; riqingho a ri tiyisisiwanga.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: A ku nga ri na munhu wa vutihlanganisi bya xihatla; a ku foneriwanga.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Xichayachaya xa riqingho a xi pfulekanga; a ku foneriwanga.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Ku ringeta ka SOS ko hetelela a ku tiyisisiwanga.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Mupfuni wa rito a nga kumeki sweswi. Ringeta nakambe endzhaku kumbe u ya emhlweni hi mupfuni loyi a tirhaka handle ka inthanete.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Hlela munhu wa vutihlanganisi bya xihatla
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Munhu wa vutihlanganisi bya xihatla u pfuxetiwile.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
